---
name: Task
about: A small, concrete piece of work with a clear done condition.
title: "[Task] "
labels: "type:chore, priority:medium"
assignees: ""
---

Type: Implementation

## Background

Explain why this task is needed.

## Target

- Who or what area this task affects

## In Scope

- Deliverables, changes, and decisions included in this task

## Out of Scope

- Items not included in this task

## Done Criteria

- [ ] Write a condition that a third party can use to verify completion

## Risks or Open Questions

- Open questions, dependencies, or concerns

## Related Epic

- #issue-number

## Current Phase

- User value / High-level design / Detailed design / Implementation / Validation / Operations and improvements

## Next Action

- The next concrete step to move the task forward

## Label Notes

- Default: `type:chore`, `priority:medium`
- Change `type:chore` to `type:feature` if this task is feature work
- Add one area label if clear: `area:backend`, `area:frontend`, or `area:infra`
- Use `documentation` if the work is mainly documentation
- Use `question` when more input is needed
- Use `help wanted` if extra support is needed
